name: Pixel Forest Adventure
desc: A 2D platformer with collectible mechanics, level progression, score tracking and sound effects.
overview: Pixel Forest Adventure is a 2D pixel-art platformer featuring collectible-based progression, combat mechanics, level unlocking, and persistent player progression. Players explore handcrafted forest environments, collect coins, defeat obstacles, and unlock increasingly challenging stages while striving for high scores and perfect level completion.

keyFeatures.title: Responsive Player Controls
keyFeatures.desc: Smooth movement, jumping, and combat interactions.

keyFeatures.title: Tilemap-Based Level Design
keyFeatures.desc: Built using Unity Tilemaps for scalable level creation.

keyFeatures.title: Combat & Attack System
keyFeatures.desc: Enemy interaction with real-time hit detection.

keyFeatures.title: UI System
keyFeatures.desc: Interactive Menus & Panels

keyFeatures.title: Collectible Progression
keyFeatures.desc: Coin collection integrated with scoring and rewards.

keyFeatures.title: Level Unlock Framework
keyFeatures.desc: Star-based progression and stage unlocking system.

keyFeatures.title: Persistent Save System
keyFeatures.desc: Stores player progress, settings, and achievements.

keyFeatures.title: Audio Management
keyFeatures.desc: Dedicated music, SFX, and volume control system.

keyFeatures.title: Real-Time Score Tracking
keyFeatures.desc: Dynamic scoring with performance-based progression.

keyFeatures.title: Reusable UI Architecture
keyFeatures.desc: Modular menus, settings, level selection, and victory screens.

keyFeatures.title: Optimized 2D Performance
keyFeatures.desc: Efficient asset management and streamlined gameplay systems.

techHighlights.title: Physics Engine
techHighlights.desc: Custom 2D rigid body physics for precise jumping.

techHighlights.title: Tilemap System
techHighlights.desc: Modular level construction using Unity Tilemaps.

techHighlights.title: Audio Manager
techHighlights.desc: Centralized audio logic for all SFX and BGM.

techHighlights.title: Responsive UI
techHighlights.desc: Canvas setups that scale across different monitors.

challenges.challenge: Building multiple levels manually would make content creation slow and difficult to maintain.
challenges.solution: Implemented Unity Tilemaps to create modular, reusable level layouts, allowing faster iteration and easier level expansion.

challenges.challenge: Players needed a way to continue their progression between sessions.
challenges.solution: Developed a persistent save system to store unlocked levels, collected stars, and user preferences.

challenges.challenge: Audio settings needed to persist across scenes and gameplay sessions.
challenges.solution: Implemented a centralized audio management system with configurable music and sound effect controls.

challenges.challenge: Increasing level complexity could impact performance and responsiveness.
challenges.solution: Optimized tilemap usage, asset organization, and scene structure to maintain stable frame rates.

challenges.challenge: Creating meaningful player interaction with environmental obstacles.
challenges.solution: Developed a destructible bamboo system where player attacks trigger obstacle destruction and award score bonuses, enhancing gameplay engagement and progression.

cta.quote: Building fun, optimized and scalable games that players love.

name: Tom And Jerry
desc: A retro-futuristic endless runner with collectible progression, real-time scoring, immersive audio, optimized mobile performance, and persistent player data.
overview: A mobile endless runner developed in Unity, featuring fast-paced obstacle avoidance, collectible-driven progression, and real-time score tracking within a stylized retro-futuristic world. The project emphasizes performance optimization through object pooling, efficient state management, and mobile-first design principles.

keyFeatures.title: Responsive Controls
keyFeatures.desc: Precision swipe-based mechanics engineered for intuitive mobile interaction.

keyFeatures.title: Dynamic Difficulty
keyFeatures.desc: An adaptive speed-curve algorithm that balances challenge and fairness as the game progresses.

keyFeatures.title: Haptic Feedback
keyFeatures.desc: Native vibration integration that provides tactile sensory immersion for collisions and collections.

keyFeatures.title: Score Tracking
keyFeatures.desc: Real-time performance monitoring and high-score recording systems.

keyFeatures.title: Audio System
keyFeatures.desc: A dynamic mixer-driven system allowing for real-time sound control and independent volume scaling.

keyFeatures.title: Mobile Optimized
keyFeatures.desc: Architecture specifically tuned for stable performance and fast load times on diverse mobile hardware.

keyFeatures.title: Collectible Progression
keyFeatures.desc: A robust rewards and power-up system that incentivizes exploration and skill-based gameplay.

keyFeatures.title: Persistent Data
keyFeatures.desc: A reliable, asynchronous save framework that tracks player progress, currency, and custom user configurations.

keyFeatures.title: Modular Architecture
keyFeatures.desc: Built on a Singleton-based framework to ensure code scalability and efficient state management.

keyFeatures.title: Efficient Asset Management
keyFeatures.desc: Utilizes high-performance object pooling to minimize garbage collection and maintain 60 FPS.

techHighlights.title: Modular Architecture
techHighlights.desc: Singleton-based systems for scalable management.

techHighlights.title: Object Pooling
techHighlights.desc: High-performance pooling for smooth gameplay.

techHighlights.title: Audio Mixer
techHighlights.desc: Dynamic audio mixing with real-time control.

techHighlights.title: Performance
techHighlights.desc: Optimized for mobile with stable 60 FPS.

challenges.challenge: Frequent object instantiation caused frame drops on mobile devices.
challenges.solution: Implemented an object pooling system which improved performance and reduced GC spikes.

challenges.challenge: Managing multiple audio sources and real-time volume control.
challenges.solution: Integrated Unity Audio Mixer with dynamic groups and exposed settings to the player.

challenges.challenge: Increasing difficulty without making gameplay unfair.
challenges.solution: Designed a speed-curve algorithm with balanced obstacle spawn patterns.

challenges.challenge: Data loss risk during app closure.
challenges.solution: Built an asynchronous, non-blocking save framework.

cta.quote: Building fun, optimized and scalable games that players love.

name: Frost Fire
desc: An engaging third-person shooter built in Unity, highlighting advanced Cinemachine camera logic, fluid animation blending, and NavMesh-driven AI.
overview: Frostfire is an engaging Third-Person Shooter (TPS) developed in Unity, featuring a vibrant, stylized 3D environment. The game focuses on a solid core combat loop, requiring players to navigate objective-based missions—such as eliminating guards, securing keys, and rescuing targets. Built with a strong emphasis on responsive controls and clean camera logic, it offers a seamless blend of movement, aiming, and shooting mechanics against intelligent AI enemies.

keyFeatures.title: Responsive TPS Combat
keyFeatures.desc: Precision aiming, shooting, and fluid character locomotion tailored for third-person action.

keyFeatures.title: Advanced Enemy AI
keyFeatures.desc: NavMesh-driven guards equipped with ranged attacks (fireballs), dynamic pathfinding, and target tracking.

keyFeatures.title: Objective-Driven Missions
keyFeatures.desc: Structured gameplay loops requiring players to secure keys, eliminate specific targets, and rescue NPCs.

keyFeatures.title: Dynamic Camera System
keyFeatures.desc: Cinemachine integration providing smooth, collision-aware third-person camera tracking and aiming logic.

keyFeatures.title: Health & Ammo Management
keyFeatures.desc: Real-time resource tracking paired with immersive visual damage feedback and screen-space hit effects.

keyFeatures.title: Fluid Animation Blending
keyFeatures.desc: Complex Animator Controllers ensuring seamless transitions between running, aiming, shooting, and taking damage.

keyFeatures.title: Interactive Level Design
keyFeatures.desc: Stylized, multi-level environments featuring vertical combat spaces, mission portals, and locked enclosures.

keyFeatures.title: Complete Game Loop UI
keyFeatures.desc: Fully functional interface elements including 3D mission briefings, pause menus, game over, and victory screens.

keyFeatures.title: Scalable Inventory System
keyFeatures.desc: A lightweight, robust inventory built entirely on ScriptableObjects, allowing for seamless item management, easy data persistence, and rapid addition of new items without modifying core code.

techHighlights.title: Modular Architecture
techHighlights.desc: Clean, scalable C# systems managing the core combat and interaction loops.

techHighlights.title: Advanced Camera Logic
techHighlights.desc: Integrated Unity Cinemachine for smooth, responsive third-person camera tracking and aiming.

techHighlights.title: Intelligent AI
techHighlights.desc: Utilized Unity NavMesh for dynamic enemy pathfinding, pursuit, and combat behavior.

techHighlights.title: Animation Blending
techHighlights.desc: Complex Animator Controller setups to seamlessly transition between running, aiming, and shooting states.

challenges.challenge: Implementing precise aiming and shooting mechanics in a third-person perspective.
challenges.solution: Integrated Unity Cinemachine with custom raycasting logic to ensure projectiles accurately align with the center screen reticle.

challenges.challenge: Ensuring fluid transitions between running, aiming, and firing states.
challenges.solution: Developed a complex Animator Controller using Blend Trees and Avatar Masks to seamlessly merge upper-body combat actions with lower-body locomotion.

challenges.challenge: Creating responsive and intelligent enemy behavior.
challenges.solution: Utilized Unity's NavMesh system paired with state-machine logic, allowing enemies to patrol, detect the player, pursue, and execute ranged attacks.

challenges.challenge: Managing performance with multiple enemies, projectiles, and particle effects active simultaneously.
challenges.solution: Implemented an object pooling system for projectiles and hit effects to minimize garbage collection and maintain a stable frame rate.

cta.quote: Building fun, optimized and scalable games that players love.

name: The Silent Prayer
desc: A survival horror FPS featuring an advanced Finite State Machine for unpredictable ghost AI, dynamic teleportation scares, and spatial audio.
overview: The Silent Prayer is a survival horror game developed in Unity, centered around atmospheric exploration and ghost-capturing mechanics. The project showcases an advanced Finite State Machine (FSM) for enemy AI, enabling unpredictable behaviors like patrolling, chasing, and hit-and-run ambushes. With a focus on spatial audio, dynamic teleportation scares, and immersive video-based UI, the game delivers a tense and highly unpredictable player experience.

keyFeatures.title: Advanced Ghost AI
keyFeatures.desc: Enemies utilize a Finite State Machine for intelligent patrolling, chasing, and hit-and-run tactics.

keyFeatures.title: Unpredictable Ambushes
keyFeatures.desc: Custom teleportation mechanics trigger jump scares from calculated, blind-spot angles.

keyFeatures.title: Ghost Capturing System
keyFeatures.desc: Engaging combat loop requiring players to track, trap, and banish entities.

keyFeatures.title: Video-Based Main Menu
keyFeatures.desc: Enhances immersion immediately upon launch using Unity RenderTextures.

keyFeatures.title: Zone-Based Audio
keyFeatures.desc: Dynamic spatial sound effects that react to player movement and enemy proximity.

keyFeatures.title: Atmospheric Environment
keyFeatures.desc: Dark, tension-filled level design with dynamic lighting and fog elements.

keyFeatures.title: Mission-Driven Gameplay
keyFeatures.desc: Clear objectives guiding the player through the haunted environment.

keyFeatures.title: Polished UI Transitions
keyFeatures.desc: Smooth menus, death screens, and victory sequences that fit the horror theme.

keyFeatures.title: Procedural Scare Engine
keyFeatures.desc: An intelligent background system that analyzes player behavior and camera angles to trigger scares unpredictably, ensuring no two playthroughs are the same.

keyFeatures.title: Audio-Driven Panic System
keyFeatures.desc: Implemented a dynamic fear mechanic where the player's breathing rate and audio intensity increase upon spotting a ghost, heightening tension through sound rather than visual clutter.

keyFeatures.title: Dynamic Particle FX
keyFeatures.desc: Custom particle systems and visual effects that make the ghost capturing mechanics feel highly impactful and rewarding.

keyFeatures.title: Custom Terrain & Environment
keyFeatures.desc: Handcrafted outdoor environments utilizing Unity's Terrain tools, featuring custom painted textures, optimized grass, and atmospheric tree placements.

techHighlights.title: Finite State Machine
techHighlights.desc: Robust AI architecture handling complex state transitions (Patrol, Chase, Ambush).

techHighlights.title: Dynamic Teleportation
techHighlights.desc: Custom logic calculating X/Z offsets relative to the player for unpredictable scares.

techHighlights.title: Spatial Audio
techHighlights.desc: Implemented zone-based audio fading to build atmospheric tension and proximity awareness.

techHighlights.title: Immersive UI
techHighlights.desc: Utilized RenderTextures and video-based main menus for seamless, thematic transitions.

challenges.challenge: Making enemy encounters feel unpredictable and terrifying rather than scripted or repetitive.
challenges.solution: Developed a custom teleportation mechanic that calculates random X/Z offsets relative to the player's position, ensuring ambushes happen from unexpected angles.

challenges.challenge: Managing complex, multi-phase enemy behaviors without creating messy, tangled code.
challenges.solution: Implemented a clean Finite State Machine (FSM) to smoothly handle AI transitions between patrolling, aggressive chasing, and tactical hit-and-run states.

challenges.challenge: Creating an immersive auditory environment that heightens player tension naturally.
challenges.solution: Utilized Unity's spatial audio tools with precise zone-based fading, ensuring sound cues dynamically match the player's proximity to unseen threats.

challenges.challenge: Players quickly memorize scripted jump scares, reducing the fear factor and replayability over time.
challenges.solution: Engineered a 'Director AI' system that evaluates player pacing, vulnerability, and field of view to deploy procedural scares and audio cues dynamically, rather than relying on fixed triggers.

challenges.challenge: Balancing visibility in a horror setting so it feels terrifyingly dark without becoming frustratingly unplayable.
challenges.solution: Implemented dynamic volumetric lighting and a physically-based flashlight mechanic that realistically illuminates specific materials while casting harsh, unpredictable dynamic shadows.

cta.quote: Building immersive, atmospheric experiences that keep players on the edge of their seats.

name: Car Parking
desc: A high-fidelity mobile parking simulator featuring dual-tier collision logic, dynamic engine audio, and LootLocker-powered global leaderboards.
overview: Car Parking is a high-fidelity 3D mobile simulation game developed in Unity, designed to deliver a console-quality driving experience on mobile devices. The game features a complete player profile ecosystem with secure login mechanics, allowing players to save their progression, earn currency, and unlock a diverse roster of vehicles in a stylized 3D garage. Built with a strong emphasis on realism and accessibility, it utilizes a strike-based collision system, dynamic engine audio, multiple control schemes (Gyroscope and Steering), and global leaderboards powered by LootLocker to create a highly addictive and polished gameplay loop.

keyFeatures.title: Dual Control Schemes
keyFeatures.desc: Players can seamlessly swap between an interactive on-screen steering wheel and responsive gyroscope (tilt) controls for a personalized driving experience.

keyFeatures.title: Comprehensive Settings Menu
keyFeatures.desc: Accessible UI allowing players to toggle control modes and independently manage background music and SFX on the fly.

keyFeatures.title: Player Profile System
keyFeatures.desc: Dedicated account management allowing players to log in, track their total stars, view owned cars, and safely log out.

keyFeatures.title: Strike-Based Collision System
keyFeatures.desc: A tension-building mechanic where players have a strict limit on minor bumps against barriers before failing, while major hazards trigger an instant Game Over.

keyFeatures.title: Dynamic Engine Audio
keyFeatures.desc: Immersive sound design where the vehicle's engine roar realistically scales up and down in response to the player's throttle input.

keyFeatures.title: Interactive 3D Garage
keyFeatures.desc: A visually polished hub menu where players can rotate, inspect, and use their collected coins to unlock high-performance vehicles.

keyFeatures.title: Extensive Level Progression
keyFeatures.desc: 12 progressively difficult parking scenarios set across detailed 3D obstacle courses, complete with a 3-star rating system based on driving precision.

keyFeatures.title: Global Leaderboards
keyFeatures.desc: Real-time competitive scoring integrated directly into the UI, driving player retention and replayability.

techHighlights.title: Backend Auth
techHighlights.desc: Full LootLocker implementation handling individual player accounts, secure login/logout states, and global leaderboards.

techHighlights.title: Mobile Input
techHighlights.desc: Engineered a flexible input manager bridging native device gyroscope data and UI-based touch inputs for seamless control switching.

techHighlights.title: Dynamic Audio
techHighlights.desc: Custom audio scripting that dynamically modulates the car engine's pitch and volume based on real-time acceleration and rigid-body velocity.

techHighlights.title: Complex Collision
techHighlights.desc: A sophisticated physics matrix differentiating between minor dynamic objects and static hazards to trigger different gameplay states.

challenges.challenge: Catering to different player preferences for mobile driving controls while maintaining precision.
challenges.solution: Developed a modular input system that supports both a physics-driven UI steering wheel and native device gyroscope controls, easily toggleable via the settings menu.

challenges.challenge: Creating a fair but challenging parking experience on a touchscreen without making players feel cheated by slight bumps.
challenges.solution: Engineered a strike-based collision system. Players are allowed a specific number of minor bumps against barriers, keeping the game forgiving but maintaining strict instant-fails for major crashes.

challenges.challenge: Making the driving feel powerful and realistic on a mobile device lacking physical engine feedback.
challenges.solution: Developed a dynamic audio script that maps the audio source's pitch directly to the car's acceleration input and current speed, simulating the revving of a real engine.

challenges.challenge: Fetching player profiles and leaderboard data directly from the server caused lag, making the main menu feel unresponsive.
challenges.solution: Integrated LootLocker with a custom local data caching layer, allowing the profile UI to populate instantly while seamlessly syncing with the database in the background.

cta.quote: Building highly optimized, AAA-quality mobile experiences.
